# `SpritePos`

**Systems:** C64, MEGA65, PLUS4, C128  
**Parameters:** `ib,b,b`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<p>Sets the x/y location (parameter 1,2) of a sprite (parameter 3)
Example:
<code>
// here, x is an int, y is a byte and i s a byte
SpritePos(x,y,i);
SpritePos(160,100,2); // puts sprite 2 at 160,100
</code>


</div>
